steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake knocks on your door almost every day now. He's loud, funny, and treats you like you've known each other for years.
steps.text_cn: 现在Jake几乎每天都会来敲你的门。他很吵、很有趣，而且对你就像认识很多年的朋友一样。

steps.instruction: 请把下列英文与对应的中文意思配对。
steps.speech_text: Match these words: knocks on your door, comes round, downstairs.
steps.feedback: Great! You understand how Jake visits you. / 很好！你理解了Jake怎么来找你的。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! 'Knocks on your door' = 敲你的门, 'comes round' = 来访, 'downstairs' = 在楼下。

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Hey, you have to try the taco truck outside. Two blocks away. The food is so good! Come on.
steps.text_cn: 嘿，你一定要试试外面的塔可餐车。就两个街区远。特别好吃！走吧。

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Now? I was going to study English...
steps.text_cn: 现在吗？我本来打算学英语……

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: This IS English class. Lesson one: how to order tacos. Let's go.
steps.text_cn: 这就是英语课。第一课：怎么点塔可。走吧。

steps.instruction: Jake: "Let's go." You walk out together. Jake says: "Taco truck is outside. We go..."
steps.feedback: Right! The taco truck is outside — you go downstairs. / 对！餐车在外面——你们下楼出去。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! The truck is outside the building — you go downstairs and outside. / 餐车在楼外面——你们要下楼出去。

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: That's Kevin in 3B. He fixes everything for free. Kevin — meet our new neighbor in 4B!
steps.text_cn: 那是3B的Kevin。他什么都会免费修。Kevin，来认识一下我们4B的新邻居！

steps.instruction: "Kevin — meet our new neighbor, 4B!" — What does Jake mean?
steps.feedback: Yes! Jake is introducing you as the new neighbor. / 对！Jake在介绍你是新邻居。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! 'Meet our new neighbor' means Jake is introducing you to Kevin. / 'Meet our new neighbor' 意思是Jake在把你介绍给Kevin。
steps.review_word: Jake wants to introduce you to Kevin.

options.label: A
options.text: Jake wants to introduce you to Kevin.

options.label: B
options.text: Jake wants to have a meeting with Kevin in 4B.

options.label: C
options.text: Jake wants to let Kevin fix something for you.

steps.speaker: Kevin
steps.text: Hi. Welcome! If you need help, let me know.
steps.text_cn: 嗨，欢迎！如果你需要帮忙，就告诉我。

steps.instruction: Kevin offered to help fix things. You want to say thank you and introduce yourself — quick!
steps.feedback: Quick and friendly! You introduced yourself well. / 又快又友好！你很好地介绍了自己。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! Kevin is being friendly — 'Thanks! I'm your new neighbor' is the best reply. / Kevin在表示友好——'Thanks! I'm your new neighbor' 是最佳回应。

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: That evening, you see a message in the building's phone group: "Sunday walk, who's in?? 🥾☀️" Jake says: "That's Lisa in 2B. She lives downstairs with her kid. She plans fun things for us. You will like her."
steps.text_cn: 那天晚上，你在公寓楼群聊里看到一条消息："周日散步，有人来吗？🥾☀️" Jake说："那是2B的Lisa。她和孩子住在楼下。她总给大家安排有趣的活动。你会喜欢她的。"

steps.instruction: Lisa sends "Sunday walk, who's in?" to the building group chat. She lives downstairs with her kid. What is happening?
steps.feedback: Yes! In the US, neighbors often plan group activities casually. / 对！在美国，邻居们经常随意组织集体活动。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! 'Who's in?' is a friendly way to invite people to join. It's very common in US neighborhoods. / 'Who's in?'是友好邀请大家参加的方式。在美国小区很常见。
steps.review_word: Lisa invites neighbors to do something together

options.label: A
options.text: Lisa invites neighbors to do something together

options.label: B
options.text: Lisa is angry at her kid

options.label: C
options.text: Lisa wants to move to a new apartment

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: You put down your phone and look around Apartment 4B. You look at your sofa, your lamp, and the window. It feels like home now. You hear Jake in the hall: "Tomorrow, we eat tacos!" You smile.
steps.text_cn: 你放下手机，环顾4B公寓。你看着沙发、台灯和窗户。这里现在有点像家了。你听见Jake在走廊里喊："明天，我们吃塔可！" 你笑了。

steps.instruction: 用下列词块拼出正确句子（含1个干扰块）。
steps.feedback: Perfect! You can introduce yourself to neighbors now. / 完美！你现在能向邻居自我介绍了。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! The correct sentence is 'I'm your new neighbor.' / 正确句子是 'I'm your new neighbor.'（我是你的新邻居。）

steps.feedback: Great! You can suggest going downstairs naturally. / 发音很棒！你能自然地说'我们下楼吧'了。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! Try again: Let's GO DOWNstairs. Stress 'go' and 'down'. / 再试一次：重读GO和DOWN。
